title: Finite Schur-Complement Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite Schur-complement bad scalar QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact block replay computes the one-by-one Schur complement as 2 while the malformed row claims 3/2.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional block inverse, PSD, or conditional-covariance rows only when they add distinct proof pressure; keep general Schur-complement, pivoting, stability, and Gaussian-conditioning theorems in theorem or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed block matrix, leading block inverse, Schur complement, determinant factors, inverse, positive-definite shadow, and conditional-variance shadow as deterministic exact-rational replay obligations.
Route false finite Schur-complement scalar claims through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the exact scalar.
Expose the pack through matrix computation, numerical-analysis, optimization, and statistics learner and consumer query surfaces.

Keep the general Schur-complement theorem, block inverse theorem, Gaussian-elimination correctness, pivoting, stability, SDP equivalences, and statistical conditioning theorem marked Lean-horizon or numerical-honesty until formal routes exist.
